params.name: Future Design Award
params.description: The Future Design Award is an international design award aimed at recognizing designers and design works that demonstrate innovative thinking and forward-looking design concepts. The award particularly focuses on projects that can foresee and lead future design trends, encouraging designers to explore the potential of design in solving social problems and improving human life. In recent years, the award's international influence has been growing, establishing partnerships with several internatio …
